title: Slice 7: Global Daemon & Claude Code Plugin — Design
summary: Technical design for transforming SpecGraph into a global daemon with graph namespacing and a Claude Code plugin wrapping the CLI.
notes: Marked 'Superseded' in header and retained for historical context; contains config schemas, Cypher patterns, and CLI surface (spec-like content) but no ADR Status/Decision/Consequences structure. Classified SPEC over DOC due to concrete technical contracts (config schema, storage constructor signature, graph edge model).
